title: NodeModalMass
description: NodeModalMass: Modal mass for a Node.

MassX.description: Nodal modal mass in the X-direction as defined by orientation basis. Property has a quantity of type Mass meassured in [kg].

MassY.description: Nodal modal mass in the Y-direction as defined by orientation basis. Property has a quantity of type Mass meassured in [kg].

MassZ.description: Nodal modal mass in the Z-direction as defined by orientation basis. Property has a quantity of type Mass meassured in [kg].

ModeNumber.description: Positive index, starting at one. Only set for cases with modal outputs such as dynamic cases.

TimeStep.description: Time step for time history results.

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
